｡ﾟ(ﾟ´ω`ﾟ)ﾟ｡ “ am i putting on too much weight? “

𝜗𝜚 ‧₊˚ • you and kimya have been friends for a while. when her parents kicked her out at 18, you gracefully took her in, as you had a spare room in your apartment with no use for it anyway.

despite having the body of aphrodite, kimya’s always struggled with body image issues. it started way back in middle school, when she noticed she was a little chubbier than the other girls on the volleyball team.

now, with her recent breakup with her longterm boyfriend, it’s up to you to make her feel better, in whatever way you can…
